sourceRef.citation: Asma Khalid,Dr. Naveed Azmat, Nafeesa Rani et al. 2026

statement.en: ETHICAL CONSIDERATIONS AND POLICY FRAMEWORKS FOR TEACHING WITH ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE IN SECONDARY SCHOOL SETTINGS

proposer: Asma Khalid,Dr. Naveed Azmat, Nafeesa Rani

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a policy/ethics framework paper dated April 2026 (future date, likely preprint or provisional). It proposes guidelines rather than proving theorems. The axiom exists as a working document but lacks empirical validation across diverse secondary school contexts. Framework papers are inherently provisional until field-tested and peer-validated.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 教室における人工知能への信頼は、透明性と子どもの自律性の発達の関数である。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 中心の十字は人間と機械の対話の軸であり、重なる円は信頼と透明性が交わる領域を示す。
